name: Adventuredome
description: Adventuredome (formerly Grand Slam Canyon) is a 5 acre indoor amusement park at Circus Circus in Winchester, Nevada on the Las Vegas Strip.  It is owned by Phil Ruffin.  It is contained within a large glass dome, and offers various rides and attractions including the Canyon Blaster and El Loco roller coasters, a rock climbing wall, an 18-hole miniature golf course, a video game arcade, and carnival-type games.
imageAttribution: The pink-colored Adventuredome, part of the Circus Circus property (2017)
